creator: ak03@gte.com
text:
Have you tried to build rep-gtk and sawfish on -CURRENT? Without the
 patch, rep-gtk is getting installed into
 /usr/X11R6/libexec/rep/i386--freebsd5.0, instead of i386-pc-freebsd5,
 where sawfish expects it to be. 
 
 On 17-Oct-2001 Maxim Sobolev wrote:
 > "Alexander N. Kabaev" wrote:
 > 
 >> >Description:
 >>         Wrong GNU target ${ARCH}-freebsd${OSREL:C/\..*//} is
 >>         specified in Makefile, while sawfish is using
 >>         ${ARCH}-pc-freebsd${OSREL:C/\..*//}
 >>
 >> >How-To-Repeat:
 >>         Build rep-gtk, then try to built sawfish and see it fail.
 > 
 > I can't reproduce it here. Could you please provide more details
 > (i.e. list of installed packages, full log of failed build and so
 > on).
 > 
 > -Maxim
 > 
 > 
 
 --------------------------------------------
 E-Mail: Alexander N. Kabaev <ak03@gte.com>
 Date: 17-Oct-2001
 Time: 09:28:42
 --------------------------------------------
